Top Nav: iOS Normal title variant is 132px tall (includes 44px built-in status bar). Shrunk title is 92px. Place at y=0, do NOT add a separate System/Status bar on top. Use Platform=iOS, Title type=Normal title for standard screens.
Chat input: Default state (h=104) includes a suggestion chips row (~32px) at the top. Use 'State=Typing/Single line' (h=395) or 'State=Filled/Single line' (h=104 without chips) if you want input only without the chip row.
Bottom bar: Includes built-in home indicator area on iOS. Place at the very bottom of the frame (y = frameHeight - componentHeight).
System/Status bar: Standalone status bar — only use this if the navigation component does NOT include a built-in one. Top Nav already includes a status bar. Do not stack them.
Chat - App / 2.Component / Chat input: Same as Chat input — default state has suggestion chips row visible above the text input area.
Notification - app/2. Component: Full-width 375px notification card. Height is 325px which includes padding.
Listing card - app/2.Component/General c: Standard listing card is 164×316px. Horizontal scrollable variant is 160×312px (slightly smaller for scroll snap).
